pr.title: grOnett, grFigureGet matches, get ftDrawCommon_80080E18 closer
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: Matched several small grOnett and grFigureGet functions, renamed remaining Onett-local fn_* symbols to grOnett_* names, improved headers and ground/item struct typing, and reworked ftDrawCommon_80080E18 to be much closer. The decomp.dev report recorded 6 new matches worth +240 bytes and two major unmatched-function improvements: grOnett_801E37F4 to 96.55% and ftDrawCommon_80080E18 to 96.35%. The same report also noted a regression: ftDrawCommon_8008051C dropped from 100% to 60.47%, likely tied to the added dont_inline pragma/context changes, so this PR was a net progress change with a documented local tradeoff.
what_changed: Implemented grOnett_801E3738, grOnett_801E37C8, grOnett_801E37F4, grOnett_801E38DC, grOnett_801E41B0, and grOnett_801E5768 or moved them closer to matching, including stage setup, gobj creation, GX link setup, callback installation, Zako generator setup, animation setup, and a Y-position comparison helper using lb_8000B1CC.
Added grOt_803E27E0 as a StageCallbacks table with two empty entries and a static grOt_804D69C0 pointer populated from Ground_801C49F8 during Onett initialization.
Renamed Onett-local placeholder symbols in config/GALE01/symbols.txt and source comments/prototypes from fn_801E3930, fn_801E40E4, fn_801E41B0, fn_801E5030, and fn_801E54B4 to grOnett_* names.

Updated gronett.h prototypes from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to concrete signatures where evidence was available, including bool returns, HSD_GObj* parameters, HSD_GObj* return for grOnett_801E37F4, void* return for grOnett_801E56FC, and Vec3/HSD_JObj arguments for grOnett_801E5768.
Implemented grFigureGet_80219C34 as a null-checked increment of gp->gv.figureget.xC and grFigureGet_80219C50 as a null-checked threshold test of gp->gv.figureget.x8 + gp->gv.figureget.xC >= 3.
Added struct grFigureGet_GroundVars to gr/types.h and inserted figureget into the Ground union, giving the Figure Get stage code typed access to x8 and xC counters.

Reworked ftDrawCommon_80080E18 variable lifetimes/types and expression structure: removed unused locals, changed ret to u32, used GET_JOBJ(gobj), called Camera_80031060 directly in the switch, reused matrix for ftDrawCommon_8008051C results, and simplified the x5C8 null test with a ternary bool expression.
Wrapped ftDrawCommon_8008051C in #pragma push / #pragma dont_inline on / #pragma pop, though the bot report says this function became a broken match in this PR.

Moved the it_802F2094 declaration out of it_27CF headers/dox and into itcoin.h with an HSD_GObj* first parameter, updated itcoin.c accordingly, changed a caller in it_2725.c from 0 to NULL, and changed itCoin_ItemVars.x14 from int to HSD_GObj*.
Made mostly formatting/include-order cleanup in ground.c and added itcoin.h where the coin spawn prototype is now sourced.
smart_moves: Used GET_GROUND and a dedicated grFigureGet_GroundVars union member instead of raw offsets, making the two grFigureGet matches concise and future-proof for additional Figure Get work.
Kept symbol names module-scoped by replacing anonymous fn_* labels with grOnett_* names in both symbols.txt and headers, improving cross-file searchability without inventing semantic names.
Converted prototypes to concrete HSD_GObj*, HSD_JObj*, Vec3*, bool, and void* types as functions became understood, reducing placeholder spread and allowing callsites to expose better matches.
Moved it_802F2094 to itcoin.h after identifying it as a coin function and typed its first parameter as HSD_GObj*, then updated callers to use NULL rather than integer 0.

For ftDrawCommon_80080E18, matching was improved by shaping C control flow and variable reuse around likely compiler output: direct switch on Camera_80031060(), outer-scope ret/matrix reuse, GET_JOBJ macro usage, and ternary null-test assignment.
decomp_lessons: When a stage-specific Ground gv layout is known, add a named GroundVars struct and union entry before implementing functions that mutate those fields; this yields clearer C and helps match small counter/threshold functions.
Symbol cleanup should be synchronized across symbols.txt, source placeholder comments, and headers. Leaving fn_* names behind after a module association is known hurts searchability.
Prefer semantic pointer types and NULL for pointer arguments once the callee signature is known; integer placeholders can obscure both type correctness and matching behavior.
Small wrapper/helper choices matter for codegen: replacing raw gobj->hsd_obj casts with GET_JOBJ can align code with project conventions and nearby decomp patterns.
Do not assume a local pragma or control-flow tweak is free: the bot report shows ftDrawCommon_8008051C regressed even while ftDrawCommon_80080E18 improved substantially.
PR evidence contains no human review discussion, so conclusions about reviewer intent or why the ftDrawCommon_8008051C regression was accepted should remain tentative.
naming_conventions: Stage Onett symbols use the grOnett_<address> prefix rather than fn_<address> once assigned to the Onett module.
Figure Get stage symbols use grFigureGet_<address>.
Stage-specific Ground union members follow lower-case stage names, e.g. gv.figureget, with a struct named grFigureGet_GroundVars.
Item coin declarations belong under it/items/itcoin.h and use itCoin_ItemVars for per-item vars.
Use HSD_GObj*, HSD_JObj*, Vec3*, and bool in headers instead of UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS when signatures are known.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Added #pragma dont_inline around ftDrawCommon_8008051C, but this caused a bot-reported match regression for that function from 100.00% to 60.47%; reuse cautiously and verify reports.
Improved ftDrawCommon_80080E18 by narrowing locals and avoiding extra temporaries: u32 ret, direct switch on Camera_80031060(), matrix reuse, and GET_JOBJ(gobj) assignments before HSD_JObjDispAll.
Simple null-checked early returns in grFigureGet_80219C34 and grFigureGet_80219C50 matched small stage functions cleanly.
Explicit else-return bool style in grOnett_801E5768 was used instead of simplifying to a direct comparison, likely preserving expected code shape.
Onett gobj setup used a local StageCallbacks* pointer, callback null checks, GObj_SetupGXLink, HSD_GObjProc_8038FD54, and an OSReport failure path to get grOnett_801E37F4 to 96.55%.
review_feedback: No human review comments were present in the PR slice.
decomp.dev bot reported matched code increased to 34.35% (+0.01%, +240 bytes).
decomp.dev bot reported 6 new full matches: grOnett_801E3738, grOnett_801E5768, grOnett_801E38DC, grFigureGet_80219C50, grOnett_801E37C8, and grFigureGet_80219C34.
decomp.dev bot reported improvements in unmatched functions: grOnett_801E37F4 from 0.00% to 96.55% and ftDrawCommon_80080E18 from 69.23% to 96.35%.
decomp.dev bot reported 1 broken match: ftDrawCommon_8008051C from 100.00% to 60.47%.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that restore ftDrawCommon_8008051C after the 60.47% regression introduced here.
Find later PRs that finish grOnett_801E37F4 from 96.55% to 100%.
Search for additional grFigureGet_GroundVars field discoveries beyond x8 and xC.
Search for subsequent it_802F2094 signature refinements or semantic naming of the coin spawn function.
Search for other stage PRs that rename fn_* symbols to module-prefixed gr*_* names in symbols.txt.
